instruction:
For the curve $x = a \cdot \left(t - \sin(t)\right)$, $y = a \cdot \left(1 - \cos(t)\right)$, determine the curvature. Use $a = 4$.

Options:
A. 1/(4*|sin(t/2)|)
B. 1/(16*|sin(t/2)|)
C. 1/(32*|sin(t/2)|)
D. 1/(8*|sin(t/2)|)
E. 1/(28*|sin(t/2)|)
F. 1/(12*|sin(t/2)|)
G. 1/(24*|sin(t/2)|)
H. 1/(20*|sin(t/2)|)
